name: Transfusion Grenade
description: On detonation, the Transfusion Grenade splits into several smaller grenades that slowly home in on nearby enemies before exploding. If a child grenade fails to lock on, it fizzles out after a short delay. Any damage dealt can trigger Transfusion, converting 30% of the card damage into healing for you and nearby allies. It works well against a lone tough target (all seekers converge) or groups, and can be thrown pre-emptively when you expect to be downed to help secure a kill and a Second Wind.
notes: This is the only Maliwan-made gear that uses explosive elemental technology. It also produces a small initial blast when it releases the child grenades, which can hurt enemies and the thrower. In Borderlands 3, Transfusion appears as a grenade payload and functions as health leech rather than a full Transfusion effect.

special.description: Splits into homing child grenades; hits return 30% of damage as healing to you and allies.
